generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing 3D point cloud data of the environment for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing vehicle speed, position, and orientation data from CAN bus"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor speed sensor monitoring rotational velocity of the propulsion motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring current steering wheel position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data collected from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed vehicle state data including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance MotorSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor rotational speed data for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data for vehicle maneuvering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks with positions and velocities from clustering and filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured SQL database for persistent storage of object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData, VehicleStateData
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Density-based spatial clustering of applications with noise for object detection in LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for tracking dynamic objects and estimating their states"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization, saving, and reporting via ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for SQL database storage operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for embedded AI capabilities on edge devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for developing data processing and visualization components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical ACC computation components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for modeling and simulation of ACC algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for operator control interface and command execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state and object tracks with data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC computations (lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionInsight, SpeedControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, ACCDisableAction, SetSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

]

]

instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Generate reports from collected operational data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for precise steering and speed control actuation"
]

instance DataCollectingNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node implementing Data Collecting FE"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node implementing Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE"
]

instance DataTranslationNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node implementing Data Translation FE"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for 3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for user control interface including ACC settings and emergency commands"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity handling chassis, sensors, and on-board processing"
    base:contains VedderESC, LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor, MotorSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, DataCollectingNode, PointCloudClusteringNode, DataTranslationNode
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity managing cloud-based computations and data storage"
    base:contains ACCComputationEnabler, DataStorageEnabler, SQLDatabase
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User-facing entity providing monitoring and control interfaces"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical vehicle environment with embedded ECUs and sensors"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance CloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cloud infrastructure for computation offloading and remote management"
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), motor actuation, and steering servo are generated by the Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE. The Data Translation component serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for these control signals. Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by standards but constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) is deployed on separate hardware, coordinating via 100 ms clock synchronization. The Physical Twin Entity handles resource-specific and general automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, while the Digital Twin Entity manages data processing and control mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 protocol for intra-SW component communication; Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer for inter-entity communication. Network latency maintained at a maximum of 100 ms (Requirement R7) and clock synchronization required across all entities (Requirement R8)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) deployed on distinct hardware components; Data Storage implemented using an SQL database."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system complies with ISO 23247 standard, particularly Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which structures the Digital Twin into Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities may implement OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection, device control, and information exchange to ensure interoperability."
]
